settings.title: Countries
settings.content: We currently ship to: the United States, Canada, Mexico, and select countries across Asia (Armenia, Bahrain, Bhutan, Brunei, India, Jordan, Lebanon, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, UAE), Europe (Greenland, Isle of Man), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand), Africa (Ethiopia), and Central America/Caribbean (Anguilla, Bahamas, British Virgin Islands, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Panama, St. Barthelemy, St. Martin, St. Vincent & Grenadines, Trinidad & Tobago, Turks & Caicos).

settings.title: Exclusion
settings.content: UK and EU customers are served by our dedicated regional storefronts and are not fulfilled from this site.

settings.title: Time
settings.content: Orders are processed within 48 hours (business days). Domestic: Standard shipping arrives in 7–10 business days, Ground shipping in 3–5 business days. International: 3–7 business days after fulfillment.

settings.title: Handling
settings.content:
Domestic: Standard shipping is $8.95 flat, free on orders over $40. Ground shipping is $10.95 flat.

Canada & Mexico: $12.00 flat, free on orders over $125.

Other countries: $20.00 flat under $125, $10.00 flat over $125.

settings.title: Tracking
settings.content: Track your order any time on our order tracking page.

settings.title: Notices
settings.content: If a carrier (FedEx, USPS, or DHL) is unable to deliver a package, it will be returned and your order refunded.
